description: Abstract top-level knowledge entity representing a foundational theory, principle, or model that underpins a domain of understanding

name.description: Name of the theory, principle, or model

description.description: Concise explanation of the theory's core idea and significance

domain.description: Subject area or field where the theory applies (e.g., distributed systems, cryptography)

related_principles.description: Names of related theories, principles, or models that complement or extend this one
